clusters.title: Bruce Lehrmann loses bid to get footage from documentary featuring Brittany Higgins ahead of rape trial
clusters.neutral_headline: Bruce Lehrmann loses legal bid for Brittany Higgins documentary footage
bullet_summary: Reported by Guardian Australia, ABC Just In

items.title: Bruce Lehrmann loses bid to get footage from documentary featuring Brittany Higgins ahead of rape trial
items.standfirst: Judge says ‘no legitimate forensic purpose’ to former Liberal staffer’s subpoena requesting footage, ahead of his Queensland trialGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastFormer political staffer Bruce Lehrmann has lost a legal bid to access copies of all footage from a documentary featuring Brittany Higgins.Lehrmann had subpoenaed the producers of the documentary Silenced and signalled a possible attempt to ban its broadcast before his Queensland trial for rape. Continue reading...
items.content: Judge says ‘no legitimate forensic purpose’ to former Liberal staffer’s subpoena requesting footage, ahead of his Queensland trialGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastFormer political staffer Bruce Lehrmann has lost a legal bid to access copies of all footage from a documentary featuring Brittany Higgins.Lehrmann had subpoenaed the producers of the documentary Silenced and signalled a possible attempt to ban its broadcast before his Queensland trial for rape. Continue reading...

items.title: Bruce Lehrmann loses legal bid for Brittany Higgins documentary footage
items.standfirst: Former Liberal staffer Bruce Lehrmann has been knocked back in a bid to gain access to raw documentary footage which featured Brittany Higgins.
items.content: Former Liberal staffer Bruce Lehrmann has been knocked back in a bid to gain access to raw documentary footage which featured Brittany Higgins.
